Testimonials

Trusted by patients. Rated on Google.

Every review is from a verified patient on Google. We believe in transparency -- real feedback from real people who trusted us with their care.

Google
4.8
Based on 182+ reviews
Patient Reviews

What patients say.

Genuine reviews from Google, shared with patient consent.

RK
Ravi Kumar3 weeks ago

My migraine frequency dropped significantly after starting treatment. Dr Arjun explained everything clearly and the follow-up care has been excellent.

SS
Sneha Sharma1 month ago

Very knowledgeable doctor who takes time to explain the condition in plain language. My epilepsy has been well-controlled for over 8 months now.

PM
Priya Mehta2 months ago

Brought my father after his stroke. Dr Arjun was patient and thorough -- gave us a very realistic recovery plan. The rehab guidance has been invaluable.

AT
Anil Tiwari2 months ago

Came for a second opinion on my Parkinson's diagnosis. Dr Arjun reviewed everything thoroughly and gave clear guidance without any pressure.

VR
Vijaya Rao3 months ago

My elderly mother's neuropathy has improved greatly. Dr Arjun called personally to check on her progress after the first treatment. That kind of care is rare.

KN
Kiran Naidu3 months ago

Honest, clear communication and no unnecessary tests. Dr Arjun recommended a conservative approach first -- it worked. I trust him completely.
